ruleMappingDetailsList.ruleExpression: SELECT * FROM `databuckk8s.new_data_set.telecom_churn_data` WHERE Customer_Satisfaction < 3 AND Support_Calls > 5 AND Billing_Issues > 3 AND Complaints > 2;
SELECT * FROM `databuckk8s.new_data_set.telecom_churn_data` WHERE Monthly_Charges > 100 AND Total_Charges < 2000 AND Tenure_Months < 12 AND Churn = true;
SELECT * FROM INTERNALQUERY WHERE email IS NOT NULL AND (first_name IS NULL OR last_name IS NULL);
SELECT * FROM INTERNALQUERY WHERE YEAR(birthdate) != birthdate AND birthdate IS NOT NULL;
